title: medimg: Compressed Sensing Reconstruction for Accelerated MRI and CT

creators.name: Tiamiyu, Abd'gafar Tunde
creators.affiliation: School of Mathematics, Jilin University, Changchun 130012, China

description: A Python package for compressed sensing and model-based image reconstruction in accelerated MRI and sparse-view CT. Implements Tikhonov regularisation, total variation (Chambolle-Pock primal-dual), and wavelet-domain L1 minimisation (FISTA) with variable-density k-space under-sampling and sparse-angle parallel-beam projections.
